  "content": [
    { "applicationCode": "MS99004", "title": "Statutory Decalration -Lost documents", "wording": "Attends to make a statutory declaration in relation to loss of original document, namely {TEXT|Specify Document Lost|100}", "isFeeDue": false, "requiresRespondent": false, "bulkRespondentAllowed": false },
    { "applicationCode": "MS99003", "title": "Statutory Decalration - Local Authority Car Park", "wording": "Attends to make a statutory declaration in relation to car park penalty issued on {TEXT|Date|10} for vehicle {TEXT|Vehicle Reg|10}", "isFeeDue": false, "requiresRespondent": false, "bulkRespondentAllowed": false },
    { "applicationCode": "MS99002", "title": "Change of name", "wording": "Attends to make a statutory declaration that henceforth the applicant will be known as {TEXT|New Name|100}", "isFeeDue": false, "requiresRespondent": false, "bulkRespondentAllowed": false },
    { "applicationCode": "MS99001", "title": "Special Constable's Attestation", "wording": "Attends to swear oath of the office of Special Constable", "isFeeDue": false, "requiresRespondent": false, "bulkRespondentAllowed": false },
    { "applicationCode": "CT99010", "title": "Issue of liability order warrant in commitment proceedings - child support", "wording": "Attends to swear a complaint for the issue of an arrest warrant for the debtor to answer an application for committal to prison in relation to unpaid child support (reference {TEXT|Reference|100})", "isFeeDue": false, "requiresRespondent": true, "bulkRespondentAllowed": false },
    { "applicationCode": "CT99009", "title": "Issue of liability order summons - child support", "wording": "Attends to swear a complaint for the issue of a summons for the debtor to answer an application for a liability order in relation to unpaid child support (reference {TEXT|Reference|100})", "isFeeDue": false, "requiresRespondent": true, "bulkRespondentAllowed": false },
    { "applicationCode": "CT99008", "title": "Issue of warrant of arrest in commitment proceedings - non-domestic rate", "wording": "Attends to swear a complaint for the issue of an arrest warrant for the debtor to answer an application for commitment to prison in relation to unpaid non-domestic rate (reference {TEXT|Reference|100})", "isFeeDue": false, "requiresRespondent": true, "bulkRespondentAllowed": false },
    { "applicationCode": "CT99007", "title": "Issue of warrant of arrest in commitment proceedings - non-domestic rate (bulk)", "wording": "Attends to swear a complaint for the issue of warrants of arrest for the debtors to answer an application for commitment to prison in relation to unpaid non-domestic rate (number of cases {TEXT|Number|4})", "isFeeDue": false, "requiresRespondent": false, "bulkRespondentAllowed": true },
    { "applicationCode": "CT99006", "title": "Issue of warrant of arrest in commitment proceedings - council tax", "wording": "Attends to swear a complaint for the issue of an arrest warrant for the debtor to answer an application for committal to prison in relation to unpaid council tax (reference {TEXT|Reference|100})", "isFeeDue": false, "requiresRespondent": true, "bulkRespondentAllowed": false },
    { "applicationCode": "CT99005", "title": "Issue of warrant of arrest in commitment proceedings - council tax (bulk)", "wording": "Attends to swear a complaint for the issue of warrants of arrest for the debtors to answer an application for committal to prison (number of cases {TEXT|Number|4})", "isFeeDue": false, "requiresRespondent": false, "bulkRespondentAllowed": true }
  ]
